name: book-of-engineering
description: Engineering workflow skills for current-work context, next-action prioritization, and work-item preflight audits.

interface.shortDescription: Engineering context, next-action, and preflight skills.
interface.longDescription: Book of Engineering packages practical engineering workflow skills for inspecting current work context, deciding what to do next, and auditing work-item validity before implementation.
defaultPrompt: Use $now-what to inspect this workspace and recommend what to do next.
Use $now-what to prioritize the current repo and branch context.
Use $now-what to decide the next current-work action.
Use $issue-preflight to audit whether this work item is still valid before implementing.
